phase_name: Rank bound is THE open problem — not proved even by Connes
task: Prove rank(M) <= bandwidth — the key contribution target

completed_tasks.name: Deep read of Connes 2020+2026: rank bound NOT proved anywhere

remaining_tasks.name: PROVE rank(M) <= bandwidth from Slepian + explicit formula

context_notes: The rank bound rank(M) <= pi*N/L is the KEY open problem. Not proved by Connes in any paper. Our numerical verification (rank=26 at bandwidth 25, verified to lam^2=5000) is the strongest evidence. PROVING this bound would be a significant original contribution. The Slepian-Landau-Pollak theory provides the framework (eigenvalue concentration at time-bandwidth product). Need to show WR+Wp inherits this concentration.
next_action: Attack the rank bound proof directly. WR is Cauchy-like (from alpha_L generators). Wp is a finite sum. Their SUM M has low effective rank because the Weil explicit formula constrains them. Try: express M as a prolate-type operator and apply Slepian theory.
